footer.description: A non-profit initiative helping parents navigate the digital world, balancing technology use with healthy educational practices.
footer.connect_desc: Get the latest resources and articles sent to your inbox.

hero.description: Parents are their children's most important educators, but finding the right relationship with the digital world is complex. Edulogia helps make technology work for your family. We provide the guides, suggestions, and support needed to build healthy digital habits and leverage the best of what technology has to offer.

blog.title: Insights & Articles
blog.description: Thoughts, research, and considerations on raising tech-literate kids in a distracted world.

resources.title: Resource Library
resources.description: Downloadable templates, interactive tutorials, and concrete guides to bridge the gap between technology and education at home.
